boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact boundary

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The current source records do not close the exact emergency-access boundary. The controlling source (SRC-E012CA4B366B-CTL) confirms the break-glass monitor and expiration record is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action.
